hero.subtitle: The EU Cyber Resilience Act demands ongoing cybersecurity for every connected product in Europe. Seentrix helps manufacturers achieve compliance, maintain it continuously, and stay audit-ready. Not just for the deadline, but for the long run.

problem.title: The CRA Compliance Challenge
problem.subtitle: Manufacturers face unprecedented cybersecurity obligations under the EU Cyber Resilience Act.

stat1.label: of manufacturers are not yet CRA-ready
stat1.description: Most companies underestimate the scope of requirements for their connected products.

stat2.label: vulnerability reporting deadline
stat2.description: Actively exploited vulnerabilities must be reported to ENISA within 24 hours.

stat3.label: maximum penalty for non-compliance
stat3.description: Or 2.5% of worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

features.title: Everything You Need for CRA Compliance
features.subtitle: Four integrated modules that guide you from assessment to certification-ready documentation.

assessment.title: Scope Assessment
assessment.description: Determine your product's CRA category, conformity route, and whether a notified body is required. All in minutes.

checklist.title: Compliance Checklist
checklist.description: Interactive checklists mapped to CRA Annex I requirements, with progress tracking and evidence linking.

sbom.title: SBOM Management
sbom.description: Upload and manage Software Bills of Materials with automated vulnerability scanning against known CVE databases.

documents.title: Document Hub
documents.description: Generate EU Declaration of Conformity, technical documentation, and vulnerability handling policies from templates.

audience.title: Built for Product Manufacturers
audience.subtitle: We built Seentrix so manufacturers of every kind can navigate CRA compliance with confidence, from first assessment to market-ready documentation.

industrial.title: Industrial & OT
industrial.description: Map your PLCs, SCADA systems, and industrial controllers against CRA Annex I requirements. Get clarity on conformity routes and notified body obligations for your operational technology.

iot.title: IoT Devices
iot.description: Manage cybersecurity-by-design obligations for connected consumer and commercial devices. Track vulnerabilities, maintain SBOMs, and generate the documentation auditors expect.

software.title: Software & Firmware
software.description: Assess standalone software products and embedded firmware against CRA scope criteria. Automate vulnerability monitoring and produce EU Declarations of Conformity from templates.

pricingPreview.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricingPreview.subtitle: Start free and upgrade as your compliance needs grow.

timeline.title: CRA Timeline: Key Deadlines
timeline.subtitle: The Cyber Resilience Act rolls out in phases. Here are the milestones that matter.

m1.title: Vulnerability Reporting
m1.description: Manufacturers must report actively exploited vulnerabilities to ENISA within 24 hours.

m2.title: Full CRA Enforcement
m2.description: All essential cybersecurity requirements apply. Products must comply before being placed on the EU market.

m3.title: Conformity Assessment
m3.description: Notified body assessments required for "important" and "critical" product categories.

trust.title: Built by Compliance Engineers
trust.subtitle: Developed in Switzerland by a team with deep roots in industrial automation and cybersecurity standards.

newsletter.title: Get Your Free CRA Readiness Checklist
newsletter.subtitle: Join our newsletter and receive a practical checklist to assess your CRA readiness, delivered straight to your inbox.
newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
